opening_neutral: The scene opens around {decision_type}, but no stable interpretation has formed yet.
opening_clarity: Too many possible paths crowd the mind. The safest move is the one that keeps the picture clear.
opening_composure: Temptation is loud here. Composure matters more than appetite.
opening_self_preservation: The air is wrong and your nerves are already thin. Survival comes before bravado.
opening_detachment: Not every shining thing deserves a hand reaching toward it. Distance can be a mercy.
judgement_default: The kernel settles on one stabilizing pattern: {rule_name}. Its pressure aligns with {theme}.
warning_default: If you push against it, the expected sanity cost is about {penalty}.
fallback: The scene remains unresolved, but the trace is preserved.
